_comment: Outbound action-class gate registry (Keel M7 — gated outbound). gate is one of: forbidden | draft_only | confirm | standing. This registry is the SECOND of two independent gates in bin/outbound-dispatch.py: an accepted decision is NECESSARY but NOT SUFFICIENT — the class must also be enabled here and its gate must permit the requested effect. `forbidden` is an EXPLICIT, ledgered refusal (strictly stronger than a class simply being absent). The known send classes (email.send, slack.reply.send) are ALSO forbidden in CODE (action_classes._CODE_FORBIDDEN), so a future edit to this config file cannot un-forbid a send — enabling any send requires a schema change + a new gate + its own eval, not a config flip.
